TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Frank_Brian, title = Frank_Brian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frank_Brian} }

S.FORM: Frank Brian sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 5, Frank Brian, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Frank Brian sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 5, Frank Brian, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2017) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
